text: Hi, I wasn't sure if I was gonna post this today, but Alaska has been through a lot the past couple days. But we are we're on day 22 of no power. We got word that we'll get power back. No, not that we'll get power back, but the mechanic will be back on Thursday this week, and hopefully we'll get power this weekend in Anchorage. I'm really, really hoping for that. I hope you guys are all having a great day. We'd appreciate prayers for those that were affected by Typhoon Halong, Datsa, Ryana.
